reply:
Base directory for this skill: /home/node/mulmoclaude/.claude/skills/obligations

# Recurring Obligations (schema-driven collection)

## Record shape

- `id` — string, **primary key** (the filename). Format `<stem>-<YYYYMMDD>`
  (e.g. `globex-retainer-20260801`) — the host's `spawn` replaces the trailing
  date when it creates the next cycle, so this format keeps the chain of ids
  clean.
- `title` — string, **required** — what must be done (shown in the reminder bell).
- `client` — string — who the obligation is toward.
- `amount` — money (USD).
- `dueOn` — date `YYYY-MM-DD`, **required** — the real due date.
- `status` — enum `pending | done | archived`, **required**.
- `completed` — **toggle, host-computed, never write it** — projects `status`
  (checked = `done`).
- `notes` — markdown.

## How the automation works (declared in schema.json — no work per cycle)

- **Reminder**: the completion bell is time-gated (`triggerField: dueOn`,
  `triggerLeadDays: 5`) — it appears 5 days **before** each due date and stays
  until the record's `status` reaches `done` (or `archived`).
- **Recurrence**: when a record becomes `done`, the host auto-creates the next
  record with `dueOn` advanced one month, anchored to `dayOfMonth: 1`, carrying
  `title` / `client` / `amount` / `notes` and resetting `status` to `pending`.
- **Stopping a recurrence**: set the current record's `status` to `archived`
  (NOT delete — spawning is convergent, so deleting the successor while the
  source is still `done` re-creates it). `archived` clears the bell and is not
  in `spawn.when`, so the chain ends there.

## What to do

**Add** — `manageCollection` putItems with `mode: "create"`; derive the id as
`<slug>-<YYYYMMDD of first due date>`, set `status: "pending"`.
**Complete** — `mode: "merge"` with `{ id, status: "done" }`; the host spawns
next month's record by itself.
**Stop** — `mode: "merge"` with `{ id, status: "archived" }` on the latest record.
**List / read** — `manageCollection` getItems (the only way to see the
`completed` toggle). Don't recite the table; link
`/collections/obligations?selected=<id>`.

After changes, call `presentCollection` to show the result inline.


ARGUMENTS: Mark the August 2026 Globex retainer (globex-retainer-20260801) as doneDone — the August Globex retainer (`globex-retainer-20260801`) is marked **done**. The host will auto-spawn September's record (due 2026-09-01) with the same $500 details, and its reminder bell will appear 5 days before the due date.

You can review everything at [/collections/obligations](/collections/obligations?selected=globex-retainer-20260801).
